jobs.name: sync-x-bookmarks-twice-daily
jobs.description: Fetches X/Twitter bookmarks twice daily and integrates new bookmarks into the shua-ledger knowledge base. Automatically categorizes bookmarks into AI/ML and Finance/Trading, adds them as individual markdown files, and syncs to Gitea.

jobs.name: morning_briefing
jobs.description: Daily morning market briefing that fetches real-time data from TradingView via MCP and posts to Mattermost Coins channel. Includes price action, technicals, and sentiment analysis.
